scripts.build: npm run generate:manifests && cargo build -p route-engine && npm run build:sdk-package && node --test packages/*/test/*.test.mjs
scripts.deploy:local-devnet: forge build --root contracts/polkadot-hub-router && node scripts/deploy-local-devnet.mjs && node packages/xroute-precompile-interfaces/scripts/generate-manifests.mjs
scripts.deploy:stack: forge build --root contracts/polkadot-hub-router && node scripts/deploy-stack.mjs && node packages/xroute-precompile-interfaces/scripts/generate-manifests.mjs
scripts.deploy:testnet: forge build --root contracts/polkadot-hub-router && XROUTE_DEPLOYMENT_PROFILE=testnet node scripts/deploy-stack.mjs && node packages/xroute-precompile-interfaces/scripts/generate-manifests.mjs
scripts.deploy:mainnet: forge build --root contracts/polkadot-hub-router && XROUTE_DEPLOYMENT_PROFILE=mainnet node scripts/deploy-stack.mjs && node packages/xroute-precompile-interfaces/scripts/generate-manifests.mjs
scripts.test: npm run generate:manifests && npm run test:rust && npm run test:solidity && npm run test:node && npm run test:package && npm run test:devnet
